description: Stable normalized event and inspector payloads exposed by the federation subscriber.

normalized_event_properties.attributes: Reflected attribute map for object.updated events.
normalized_event_properties.class_handle_text: Text form of the RTI class handle when available.
normalized_event_properties.class_name: Resolved object or interaction class name when available.
normalized_event_properties.details: Scenario phase or operation detail payload.
normalized_event_properties.event_type: Stable normalized category for subscriber clients.
normalized_event_properties.family: Derived or declared FOM family classification.
normalized_event_properties.interaction_class: Resolved interaction class name for interaction.received events.
normalized_event_properties.object_handle_text: Text form of the RTI object-instance handle when available.
normalized_event_properties.object_key: Stable object identity key used by the generic object inspector.
normalized_event_properties.object_name: Human-readable object instance name when available.
normalized_event_properties.observer_role: Role of the observing federate when available.
normalized_event_properties.parameters: Interaction parameter map for interaction.received events.
normalized_event_properties.payload: Original raw payload when no stronger normalized field exists.
normalized_event_properties.phase: Scenario phase label for scenario.phase events.
normalized_event_properties.provider: Scenario provider lane such as siso-runtime, two-federate, or target-radar.
normalized_event_properties.sequence: Integer source event sequence from the observer trace.
normalized_event_properties.source: Listener or emitting federate identity when available.
normalized_event_properties.tag: User-supplied tag or equivalent correlation bytes converted to text/hex.

title: Runtime Observer Normalized Event Schema
